title: Flechette mine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Flechette mines''' were [[Mine/Legends|mines]] which exploded in a hail of [[Flechette/Legends|flechettes]].

Known varieties include the [[LX-1 laser-flechette mine]].

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-09-16 -->''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]''

[[Category:Land mines]]
